Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
64 
PRCTC_LCTN_IND 
LABEL: 
Practice Location Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Indicator denoting if this is a practice location address type for the provider. 
SHORT NAME: PRCTC_LCTN_IND 
LONG NAME: PRCTC_LCTN_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR Location 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
There can be multiple records per
